title: Article 102. Forcing a safeguard
doc_html:
§202.  Article 102.  Forcing a safeguard

Any person subject to this code who forces a safeguard shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.  

Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.

§202.  Article 102.  Forcing a safeguard
Any person subject to this code who forces a safeguard shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.
